headline: Linde Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y, Dividend Raised
summary: LIN's bottom line beat Q1 estimates as pricing and project start-ups drive growth, with revenues up 8% and EPS rising 10% year over year.

raw.headline: Linde Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y, Dividend Raised
raw.summary: LIN's bottom line beat Q1 estimates as pricing and project start-ups drive growth, with revenues up 8% and EPS rising 10% year over year.

headline: Dow and Louisiana-Pacific have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Dow surges on petrochemical supply shocks and rising prices, while Louisiana-Pacific struggles with weak OSB demand and falling earnings outlook.

headline: 5 Large-Cap Momentum Stocks to Buy in May After a Fabulous April
summary: FIX, TXN, ONTO, NTRS and DOW are five large-cap stocks riding April's record rally, backed by AI demand, earnings strength and momentum signals heading into May.

headline: Bull of the Day: Dow Inc. (DOW)
summary: Known for its cyclical but lucrative earnings potential, Dow Inc. is benefiting from major disruptions in the global chemical supply chain.
